_comment: Builder harness checklist. The agent works one feature at a time and sets passes:true ONLY after verifying. Do not delete features to make this pass.

features.title: Hero with value prop + primary CTA
Lead-magnet section describing the downloadable asset
Cloudflare Worker endpoint /api/lead that accepts submissions
Lead written to Google Sheets CRM (or D1 fallback)
Thank-you / next-step page with calendar CTA
Title, meta description, OG tags for the niche
npm run build and typecheck pass clean
